scripts.build: npm run build -w @code-as-pixelart/core && npm run build -w @code-as-pixelart/cli && npm run build -w @code-as-pixelart/mcp && npm run build -w @code-as-pixelart/studio
scripts.check: npm run build -w @code-as-pixelart/core && npm run check --workspaces --if-present
scripts.mcp: npm run build -w @code-as-pixelart/core && npm run build -w @code-as-pixelart/cli && npm run build -w @code-as-pixelart/mcp && node packages/mcp/dist/bin.js
